calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Petition Changing Name. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heald. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court grants the Decree changing Petition's name to Deidre Van Rock-Ricci. Decree signed in open court.
